proof_boundary: This draft is a launch-readiness artifact only. It must not be copied into supabase/migrations or applied to hosted Supabase until owner approval, hosted policy inspection, local pgTAP tests, and linked-project approval gates are complete.

policy_decisions.decision: owner/reviewer/admin access; no anonymous read or insert by default
policy_decisions.commercial_reason: Analysis rows can contain customer questions, source context, strategist output, and review state.
policy_decisions.public_exception_status: not approved in this draft; requires explicit published/redacted workflow

policy_decisions.decision: owner, assigned reviewer, queue reviewer, or admin access only
policy_decisions.commercial_reason: Review records expose high-stakes reviewer decisions and feedback.

policy_decisions.decision: own profile row plus admin access; direct reviewer reads require a separate approved minimization path
policy_decisions.commercial_reason: User role data powers RLS decisions and should not be public catalog data.

policy_decisions.decision: owner or approved reviewer/admin access through linked analysis_runs
policy_decisions.commercial_reason: Assets can contain handouts, slides, source packages, and customer analysis material.
policy_decisions.public_exception_status: only via explicit published/redacted asset workflow, not included in this draft

policy_decisions.decision: admin-only direct reads until owner chooses an analysis_run_id/user_id schema link
policy_decisions.commercial_reason: Validation failures can leak prompts, raw model output, schema internals, and customer context.

open_decisions.alternative: add analysis_run_id uuid references public.analysis_runs(id) and owner/reviewer policies through analysis_runs
open_decisions.reason: Current migrations define schema_failures with request_id/raw_response/validation_errors but no durable owner column.

open_decisions.alternative: create a separate redacted/published summary table or explicit published_at flag before public reads
open_decisions.reason: status=completed alone is not enough to prove a row is safe for anonymous or public reads.

open_decisions.alternative: create a least-privilege reviewer profile view with only role/name fields needed for queue work
open_decisions.reason: The users table powers role checks and should not become a broad reviewer directory without minimization.

required_approval_gates: Owner approves identity_and_review table classifications and public exceptions.
Owner chooses schema_failures owner path: admin/service-role only or add analysis_run_id/user_id.
Current hosted Supabase policies are inspected before migration text is finalized.
SQL draft is converted into one timestamped migration only after approval.
Generated pgTAP template is converted into supabase/tests with helpers and run locally.
Linked-project pgTAP and hosted smoke are run only after explicit production approval.
